name: Booking.com
business_model: Online hotel and accommodation marketplace; merchant and agency models.
ai_strategy: AI-powered pricing, personalised search, Smart Filter, generative travel assistants.

name: Expedia
business_model: Full-service OTA (consumer) plus Expedia Partner Solutions (B2B distribution).
ai_strategy: Romie conversational trip planner; ChatGPT plugin; AI Trip Matching for social Reels.

name: Trip.com
business_model: Asia-first full-service OTA; expanding globally through acquisitions.
ai_strategy: TripGenie AI assistant; demand-forecasting for flash sales; multilingual AI agent.

name: Airbnb
business_model: P2P short-term rental marketplace; host + guest fee model.
ai_strategy: AI-generated listings, smart pricing for hosts, experience recommendations, AI Customer Service Agent.

name: Agoda
business_model: Asia-Pacific hotel specialist; subsidiary of Booking Holdings.
ai_strategy: ML-driven competitive rate parity; personalised deal engine; Agoda AI travel assistant.

name: MakeMyTrip
business_model: Indian full-service OTA dominating domestic flights and hotels; owns Goibibo and redBus.
ai_strategy: Myra AI chatbot for support; predictive fare alerts; myBiz corporate AI insights.

name: ShareTrip
business_model: Bangladesh-first OTA; flights and hotels for the South Asian market.
ai_strategy: Visa AI assistant and predictive pricing for the Dhaka market.

name: Kayak
business_model: Travel meta-search and price-comparison; subsidiary of Booking Holdings.
ai_strategy: PriceCheck AI, ChatGPT integration, AI-powered itinerary scanner.

name: Traveloka
business_model: Southeast-Asian travel super-app with Traveloka for Business arm.
ai_strategy: Personalised recommendations, dynamic-bundle pricing, AI customer service across SEA markets.

name: Kiwi.com
business_model: Virtual interlining — combining tickets across carriers into one booking.
ai_strategy: Graph-based route optimisation; AI disruption management; ML pricing.

name: Etraveli
business_model: Flight-first OTA (Mytrip, GoToGate) with white-label B2B distribution.
ai_strategy: Dynamic ancillary upsell using ML models; AI fraud detection.

name: eDreams ODIGEO
business_model: Subscription-based OTA (Prime programme); flights & hotels.
ai_strategy: AI subscription churn prevention; personalised offer engine; generative AI itinerary builder.

name: KKday
business_model: Asian-focused tours and experiences marketplace.
ai_strategy: AI-powered local guide recommendations; multilingual GenAI support.

name: Goibibo
business_model: Indian consumer OTA; subsidiary of MakeMyTrip Group.
ai_strategy: Shared MMT Myra AI stack; AI-powered hotel ranking.

name: Klook
business_model: Asia-Pacific experiences and tours marketplace; activities + transport.
ai_strategy: GenAI itinerary generator; AI translation for inventory; smart recommendations.

name: Cleartrip
business_model: Indian OTA; owned by Flipkart/Walmart; flights & hotels.
ai_strategy: Flipkart-shared ML personalisation stack; chatbot self-service.

name: EaseMyTrip
business_model: Indian no-convenience-fee OTA; flights, hotels, holidays.
ai_strategy: Voice-AI booking; predictive fare alerts; GenAI corporate trip planner.

name: Yatra.com
business_model: Indian OTA with strong corporate-travel (MICE) business after Globe Travels acquisition.
ai_strategy: MICE-focused AI trip planning; predictive analytics for corporate travel managers.

name: yanolja
business_model: Korean travel super-app + Yanolja Cloud B2B hospitality SaaS.
ai_strategy: Yanolja Cloud GenAI: AI concierge, dynamic pricing, demand forecasting for hotel partners.

name: Yeogi (GoodChoice)
business_model: Korean accommodation OTA; rebrand from "Yeogi Eottae" / Good Choice.
ai_strategy: AI-powered booking funnel and review summarisation.

name: Skyscanner
business_model: Global flight, hotel, and car-hire meta-search; subsidiary of Trip.com Group.
ai_strategy: AI-powered travel insights; Savings Generator; conversational trip planning.
